# Newline-separated URL list for unauthenticated Lighthouse runs.
# Filled by Workstream B (lighthouse-a11y/specs/03-landscape-ui-caller.md).
# Paths starting with `/` are prefixed with the workflow's `serve-url`.
#
# Example entries (commented out until WS-B lands):
# /login
# /create-account
# /no-access
